text: [user] API rate limit 429 keeps returning on our staging webhook. We masked tenant id TEN-****-01. [assistant] Please share the request id from response header X-Req-**** so we can trace the throttle bucket.

[user] Our log pipeline drops multiline stack traces when gzip is enabled on the forwarder. [assistant] Try disabling partial flush or increase buffer window; share a redacted sample line with timestamps only.
[user] Billing export CSV shows duplicate rows for invoice INV-****-884 after currency conversion. [assistant] We are checking FX rounding on line items; no card numbers needed in this ticket.
[user] SSO login fails for users on domain @example-corp.com after IdP cert rotation. [assistant] Confirm new metadata URL and whether SAML clock skew exceeds five minutes.
[user] Mobile push notifications arrive late only on Android 14 devices in EU region. [assistant] Please note app version and whether battery saver is enabled; no device IMEI required.
[user] Data warehouse sync job JOB-****-772 stalled at step 3 for six hours. [assistant] We will inspect warehouse credentials scope; do not paste secrets in chat.
[user] Feature flag rollout at 10 percent caused elevated 500 errors on checkout path. [assistant] Roll back flag checkout_v2_shadow or share masked trace id from error page.
[user] GDPR deletion request for user u_****_991 not completing after 72 hours. [assistant] Legal hold may block purge; we will confirm queue status without personal email.
[user] Kubernetes pod restarts every five minutes with OOM on memory limit 512Mi. [assistant] Share deployment name and whether limits were changed recently; redact cluster admin kubeconfig.
[user] Search index lag is 45 minutes after bulk reindex job. [assistant] Check indexer backlog metric and whether refresh interval was lowered during peak.
[user] Partner API sandbox returns 403 for scope read:inventory only. [assistant] Verify OAuth client id ends with **** and that sandbox key is not production.
[user] Training job GPU quota shows zero though billing tier is enterprise. [assistant] Quota region may differ from job submit region; share project id with last four chars masked.
